summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements. REQ-2, REQ-3, and REQ-4 are well-covered. REQ-1 has a partial implementation — the backend proxyUrl function is updated but the outcall module only returns raw text, not a structured response with status code and content-type. Several AC items for REQ-1 (status code propagation, content-type preservation, base64 for images) are handled heuristically on the frontend rather than in the backend. REQ-4's retry button AC item appears missing from the diff. REQ-2's statusCode is hardcoded to 200 rather than propagated from the upstream server.

missing_requirements.requirement: Return status code and content-type header from the backend proxyUrl function, and return binary resources as base64-encoded data from the backend.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend main.mo only returns raw text (a single Text value) from proxyUrl. There is no structured return type with statusCode, contentType, and body. Content-type detection and base64 handling are done heuristically on the frontend, not propagated from the upstream server. Errors from upstream are not propagated with appropriate status codes — statusCode is hardcoded to 200 in useQueries.ts.

missing_requirements.requirement: If the proxy request fails, an error message is shown in the content area with the failed URL and a retry button.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows error state handling and error messages in BrowserLayout.tsx, but no retry button is visible in the truncated diff. The ProxyContent.tsx file-summary mentions error state handling but no retry button UI is described.

hallucinated_features.description: DuckDuckGo HTML search parsing in useSearchRequest as a replacement for Google Custom Search API
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention replacing or updating the search functionality. The useSearchRequest hook was rewritten to use DuckDuckGo HTML search and parse results, which was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: GamesPage component with game site cards (Math Playground, Hood Math, Unblocked Games)
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement in the build request mentions adding a games page or game site navigation cards.

hallucinated_features.description: ClockWidget component displaying live time and date
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement in the build request mentions adding a clock widget.

hallucinated_features.description: CloakButton with multiple disguise modes using history.replaceState
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement in the build request mentions adding or modifying a cloaking or disguise feature.
